creator: mkhitrov@gmail.com
text:
Just ran into the same situation. This is a clean install of 7.0-Beta3
(amd64) on VMWare Workstation 6. So far I've built ccache, xorg,
xfce4, and slim ports. Since I've had some problems with ccache before
I decided to rebuild panel without it, that didn't help. Will let you
know if I find a possible solution.

- Max
